name: Crash-Deadline Hovercar
description: Steer a moving vehicle with the keyboard while dwelling the cursor over correct visual regions long enough to validate them before impact.
natural_language: Complete each hover check while keeping the vehicle from crashing. Accelerate and steer continuously with the keyboard while tracking each transient moving inspection sigil with the pointer for its full uninterrupted dwell.

metadata.variant_count_kind: course curvature, obstacle offsets, target motifs, target orbits, dwell windows, phases, and visual palette
metadata.notes: A 50 ms deterministic physics loop never pauses during pointer inspection; the grader independently replays keys, inertia, symmetric AABB collisions, temporal target geometry, and contiguous dwell.
